segments.text: Then Bildad the Shuhite replied:
How long will you go on saying such things? The words of your mouth are a blustering wind.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Does God pervert justice? Does the Almighty pervert what is right?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: When your children sinned against Him, He gave them over to their rebellion.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: But if you would earnestly seek God and ask the Almighty for mercy,
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text:
if you are pure and upright, even now He will rouse Himself on your behalf
and restore your righteous estate.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Though your beginnings were modest, your latter days will flourish.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Please inquire of past generations and consider the discoveries of their fathers.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: For we were born yesterday and know nothing; our days on earth are but a shadow.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Will they not teach you and tell you, and speak from their understanding?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Does papyrus grow where there is no marsh? Do reeds flourish without water?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: While the shoots are still uncut, they dry up quicker than grass.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Such is the destiny of all who forget God; so the hope of the godless will perish.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: His confidence is fragile; his security is in a spider’s web.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: He leans on his web, but it gives way; he holds fast, but it does not endure.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: He is a well-watered plant in the sunshine, spreading its shoots over the garden.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: His roots wrap around the rock heap; he looks for a home among the stones.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: If he is uprooted from his place, it will disown him, saying, ‘I never saw you.’
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Surely this is the joy of his way; yet others will spring from the dust.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Behold, God does not reject the blameless, nor will He strengthen the hand of evildoers.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: He will yet fill your mouth with laughter, and your lips with a shout of joy.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Your enemies will be clothed in shame, and the tent of the wicked will be no more.
segments.speaker: Unknown
